children.default: Deliver seamless omnichannel customer journeys powered by real-time intelligence

default.title: Retail & Commercial Banking
default.line: Deliver seamless omnichannel customer journeys powered by real-time intelligence

hover_items.text: Relationship intelligence turning transactions and cash flow data into meaningful conversations
Intelligent self-service resolving queries without escalation
Credit decisions from days to hours via EVOQ Underwriting Workbench for all borrowers

default.title: Credit Unions
default.line: Deepen member loyalty and amplify community impact via intelligent scale

hover_items.text: Member intelligence turning life events into proactive, community-focused financial support
Automated member-service resolving common inquiries instantly to focus staff on high-value advice
Shared infrastructure orchestration enabling credit unions to compete with national banks through intelligent scale

default.title: Lending
default.line: Smarter credit decisioning and automated lifecycle management

hover_items.text: Explainable credit decisioning with full Fair Lending compliance
Early warning signals on credits before they become NPLs
End-to-end digital origination with embedded document intelligence

default.title: Cards & Payments
default.line: Secure, real-time payment ecosystems with personalized transaction experiences

hover_items.text: Multi-layered fraud intelligence protecting revenue without degrading UX
Smart routing, FX intelligence & compliance checks in milliseconds
API-first infrastructure powering embedded finance partnerships

default.title: Asset & Wealth Management
default.line: AI-powered platforms for enhanced client engagement with personalized advisory

hover_items.text: Portfolio intelligence & real-time next-best-action for advisors
Segment-of-one client journeys across every life stage
Automated regulatory filings, MiFID II, FATCA, and beyond

default.title: Capital Markets
default.line: Optimize trade lifecycles and data integrity for real-time efficiency

hover_items.text: Live exposure monitoring and counterparty risk signals

EMIR, SFTR & MiFIR filings generated autonomously
